subject: [RFC PATCH 14/40] mm: page_alloc: add per-superpageblock free lists

2026-05-20.patch_summary: This patch introduces per-superpageblock (SPB) free lists to improve allocation steering and memory-hotplug correctness. The SPB free lists allow the allocator to target specific superpageblocks without walking the entire zone, making it more efficient. Additionally, the patch addresses two latent bugs related to memory-hotplug: one where list heads are not properly initialized on hot-add, and another where embedded free lists are not updated during resize operations. The patch takes a critical section lock to prevent concurrent access by the allocator while updating the per-SPB free lists.
